title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Sualeh Asif interviews Simon Eskildsen on infrastructure scaling at Shopify, the cyclical emergence of new database companies, AI coding capabilities and failures, and the characteristics of high-performing engineers in the AI era. Topics include flash sale handling, on-call engineering principles, and the future direction of database technology.
